hero.title: Photographs that look like the day actually felt
hero.subtitle: I shoot weddings, portraits, and events in a quiet documentary style — real moments over stiff poses, light over filters. If you hate being photographed, we'll get along fine.
hero.imageAlt: Candid wedding photograph in warm evening light

items.title: Weddings
items.description: Full-day coverage from morning preparations to the last dance. I work quietly from the edges — most guests won't remember I was there, but the photos will show they were.

items.title: Portraits
items.description: Individuals, couples, and families, on location around Novi Sad or in the studio. Sessions are slow and unhurried; the good frames come after you forget the camera.

items.title: Events & business
items.description: Conferences, openings, and team photos that don't look like stock photography. Delivered fast, licensed for whatever you need them for.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Lena Popović — fifteen years behind the camera, still nervous before every wedding.
about.body: I started in newsrooms, and it shows: I look for moments, not setups. My couples get an unfussy day, a gallery within two weeks, and prints that will survive longer than hard drives. I photograph a limited number of weddings each year so every one gets full attention — including the boring-but-important parts like scouting your venue's light beforehand.

items.title: Documentary first
items.description: Real moments as they happen. Posed photos take twenty minutes of your day, not three hours.

items.title: Two weeks, not six months
items.description: Your full edited gallery lands within fourteen days. Sneak peeks within 48 hours.

items.title: Backup everything
items.description: Two camera bodies, dual cards, three copies of every file before I sleep.

items.title: No hidden fees
items.description: The package price includes editing, the online gallery, and print rights.

items.alt: Couple under confetti at the exit
items.caption: The exit

items.alt: Portrait in wheat field at dusk
items.caption: Golden hour portrait

items.name: Mina & Aleksandar
items.text: We forgot she was there — and somehow she caught every moment we would have wanted to remember, including ones we missed ourselves.

items.name: Jovan T.
items.text: Our four-year-old refuses to pose for anyone. Lena just followed him around the orchard for an hour and the photos are the best we have.

items.name: Kreativna agencija Okvir
items.text: Team photos that people actually agreed to put on the website. That has literally never happened before.

pricing.title: Packages
pricing.subtitle: Every package includes editing, an online gallery, and print rights. Travel within 50 km included.

plans.name: Portrait session
plans.description: On location or studio, 40+ edited photographs.

plans.name: Wedding day
plans.description: Preparations to party, 500+ edited photographs, sneak peek in 48h.

items.question: How far in advance should we book?
items.answer: For weddings in the May–October season, six to twelve months. Portraits and events can usually fit within two or three weeks.

items.question: We're awkward in front of cameras. Will that be a problem?
items.answer: You're my favourite kind of client. The documentary approach exists exactly for you — no prolonged posing, no 'now look at each other and laugh'. We walk, you talk, I shoot.

items.question: Do we get the unedited files?
items.answer: No — the edit is half the craft, and outtakes with closed eyes serve nobody. You get every good frame, fully edited, and that's genuinely everything worth having.

items.question: Can we print the photos ourselves?
items.answer: Yes, print rights are included in every package. I'll also gladly recommend the lab I trust for large formats — there's a real difference.

cta.title: Have a date in mind?
cta.subtitle: Tell me about your day — if I'm free, we'll meet for coffee and see if we click.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Tell me what you're planning and when. I answer within a day.

form.messageLabel: What are you planning, and when?
